markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a process for revamping 164 website pages for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Project Scope:** Revamp 164 website pages to update messaging and improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Workflow:** SMEs update content → GrowthX adds SEO recommendations → Outreach implements changes.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Coordination:** Hadassah will manage the project in batches via a central spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Priority:** This project is a pre-migration priority to fix technical SEO issues before the CMS move, ensuring a clean baseline for tracking performance.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Inefficient Page Revamp Process

  - [Outreach is updating 164 website pages to align messaging with recent product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [The current process is inefficient:](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - [SMEs provide content feedback in Word docs.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [Hadassah manually transfers this to a spreadsheet for SEO review.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [This creates a risk of inconsistent SEO application and missed opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### The Solution: A Collaborative, SEO-Driven Workflow

  - [A new, collaborative workflow was established to streamline the process:](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
    1.  [**SME Review (Outreach):** SMEs update page copy for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
    2.  **SEO & Content Recommendations (GrowthX):**
          - [Review SME-updated docs for technical SEO (titles, metadata, linking).](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
          - [Provide strategic content suggestions, including competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
          - [Flag design/schema opportunities for Kendra's team.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
    3.  [**Implementation (Outreach):** Andrew and Kendra's team implement all changes on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

### Coordination & Timeline

  - [Hadassah will manage the project in batches via a central spreadsheet, which will track:](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Page URLs](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Links to SME-updated docs](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Status (e.g., "Ready for GrowthX," "Complete")](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [**Resource Allocation:** GrowthX can pause blog production to accelerate work on larger batches.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** GrowthX will complete SEO updates (meta titles/descriptions) for pages already content-updated by Outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hadassah:**](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Create the central spreadsheet for the first batch of pages.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Share the spreadsheet with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [Develop a checklist for SEO/content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [Complete SEO updates for pages Outreach has already finished.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
      - [Review the Screaming Frog report async to identify technical issues for pre-migration fixing.](https://fathom.video/share/uWDsq65dd6-qYp4dtYPQe6MTx2rpM8qP?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
